rows.name: Caipirinha

rows.name: Margarita
rows.garnish: Salt Rim and dehydrated lime wheel

rows.name: Moscow Mule
rows.serve_extras: 2 Dashes Angostura Bitters, Top Ginger beer

rows.name: Bramble
rows.serve_extras: Cassis over top of crushed ice

rows.name: Irish Coffee
rows.serve_extras: Spoon of brown sugar, Layered Siphon cream

rows.name: Dark & Stormy
rows.serve_extras: 2 Dashes Angostura Bitters, Top Ginger beer

rows.name: Bloody Mary
rows.serve_extras:
3 dashes Tabasco

2 dashes Celery salt

rows.name: Rhubarb Syrup
rows.technique: 1:1 sugar syrup and rhubarb. Stew rhubarb in sugar syrup until soft, keep the rhubarb kompot for texture.

rows.name: Spice Mix
rows.technique: 12 cut chilli + 1l honey + 1l sugar syrup + 15g sichuan pepper + 45g black pepper. Blend for 1 minute, mill for 1 minute, strain 5-6 times.

rows.name: Ernst Cardamom Syrup
rows.technique: 10 lightly crushed cardamom pods per 1l sugar syrup. Simmer for 10 minutes, steep for 20 minutes off heat, then strain.

rows.name: Honey Syrup
rows.technique: 1:1 honey and sugar syrup. Mix together, no heating required.

rows.name: Spice Mix
rows.preparation_notes: 12 cut chilli + 1l honey + 1l sugar syrup + 15g sichuan pepper + 45g black pepper. Blend for 1 minute, mill for 1 minute, strain 5-6 times.

rows.name: Ernst Cardamom Syrup
rows.preparation_notes: 10 lightly crushed cardamom pods per 1l sugar syrup. Simmer for 10 minutes, steep for 20 minutes off heat, then strain.

rows.name: Honey Syrup
rows.preparation_notes: 1:1 honey and sugar syrup. Mix together, no heating required.

rows.name: Rhubarb Syrup
rows.preparation_notes: 1:1 sugar syrup and rhubarb. Stew rhubarb in sugar syrup until soft, keep the rhubarb kompot for texture.

rows.name: Sugar Syrup
rows.preparation_notes: 1:1 sugar and water. Simmer sugar and water until sugar dissolves, cool before use.
